task_updates.executor_notes: Created `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/banodoco-workspace/supabase/migrations/ROLLBACK_discord_sync.md`. The document covers the required reverse-order rollback path for the Discord sync rollout: unscheduling both cron jobs, dropping `internal.discord_promote_resources(BOOLEAN)`, dropping `asset_comment_media`, `asset_comments` (which also removes `asset_comments.discord_guild_id`), `media_import_jobs`, removing `asset_media.is_deleted`, removing the `assets` Discord-import columns including `discord_guild_id`, dropping `discord_messages_resource_op_idx`, dropping `internal.get_service_role_key()` and `internal.secrets`, and noting the frontend revert scope. It also includes the requested risk register items and the three follow-ups (`comment` media lightbox, Cloudflare duration webhook extension, `supabase_vault` migration). Verification was file-level plus full-suite regression checking: I re-read the markdown file after writing it, and reran `pytest --tb=no -q --no-header`, which still ends with the same 7 existing failures seen in prior batches (`brain-of-bndc/tests/test_payment_cog_split.py::test_split_cogs_preserve_view_registration_and_cap_breach_routing`, `tools/tests/test_arrange.py::ArrangeTest::test_cli_fills_hash_envelope_from_file_bytes`, `tools/tests/test_arrange.py::ArrangeTest::test_payload_passes_validate_arrangement`, `tools/tests/test_audio_render.py::AudioRenderTest::test_rendered_mp4_contains_audio_stream`, `tools/tests/test_hype_cut_invariants.py::test_hype_cut_invariants_on_discovered_run_dirs`, `tools/tests/test_multitrack_cut.py::MultitrackCutTest::test_compile_arrangement_plan_rejects_short_overlay`, and `tools/tests/test_schema_contract.py::SchemaContractTest::test_generator_byte_stability`).

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. `ROLLBACK_discord_sync.md` now covers the rollback drop order for the new tables, columns, schedules, function, index, and secret-accessor objects; it names the required risks (Cloudflare quota, Discord rate limits, edge-function timeout, storage cost, unseeded `internal.secrets`); and it lists the three follow-ups: comment-media lightbox, Cloudflare duration webhook extension, and a `supabase_vault` migration.
